creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rene        2010-06-15 17:28:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt           Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/wanted-ports Makefile pkg-descr 
    ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/files wanted-ports.1.in 
                                  wanted-ports.in wanted-ports.pod 
  Log:
  A special meta-port to do nothing but register dependencies on those
  ports you specifically want to have installed.  The normal dependency
  checking in programs like pkg_delete(1) will prevent easy deletion of
  ports that other ports depend on.  Keeps egg off face.  Protects feet
  from being shot.
  
  PR:             ports/147808
  Submitted by:   Matthew Seaman <m.seaman at infracaninophile.co.uk>
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.36      +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +238 -0    ports/ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/files/wanted-ports.1.in (new)
  1.1       +370 -0    ports/ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/files/wanted-ports.in (new)
  1.1       +129 -0    ports/ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/files/wanted-ports.pod (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/wanted-ports/pkg-descr (new)
